verses.latin_vulgate: Miserere mei, Deus, miserere mei,  quoniam in te confidit anima mea.  Et in umbra alarum tuarum sperabo,  donec transeat iniquitas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חׇנֵּ֤נִי אֱלֹהִ֨ים ׀ חׇנֵּ֗נִי כִּ֥י בְךָ֮ חָסָ֢יָה נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י וּבְצֵֽל־כְּנָפֶ֥יךָ אֶחְסֶ֑ה עַ֝֗ד יַעֲבֹ֥ר הַוּֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Be merciful unto me, O God, be merciful unto me: for my soul trusteth in thee: yea, in the shadow of thy wings will I make my refuge, until these calamities be overpast.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamabo ad Deum altissimum,  Deum qui benefecit mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶ֭קְרָא לֵאלֹהִ֣ים עֶלְי֑וֹן לָ֝אֵ֗ל גֹּמֵ֥ר עָלָֽי׃
verses.king_james: I will cry unto God most high; unto God that performeth all things for me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit de cælo, et liberavit me ;  dedit in opprobrium conculcantes me.  Misit Deus misericordiam suam et veritatem suam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׁלַ֤ח מִשָּׁמַ֨יִם ׀ וְֽיוֹשִׁיעֵ֗נִי חֵרֵ֣ף שֹׁאֲפִ֣י סֶ֑לָה יִשְׁלַ֥ח אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים חַסְדּ֥וֹ וַאֲמִתּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: He shall send from heaven, and save me from the reproach of him that would swallow me up. Selah. God shall send forth his mercy and his truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: et eripuit animam meam de medio catulorum leonum.  Dormivi conturbatus.  Filii hominum dentes eorum arma et sagittæ,  et lingua eorum gladius acutus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַפְשִׁ֤י ׀ בְּת֥וֹךְ לְבָאִם֮ אֶשְׁכְּבָ֢ה לֹ֫הֲטִ֥ים בְּֽנֵי־אָדָ֗ם שִׁ֭נֵּיהֶם חֲנִ֣ית וְחִצִּ֑ים וּ֝לְשׁוֹנָ֗ם חֶ֣רֶב חַדָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: My soul is among lions: and I lie even among them that are set on fire, even the sons of men, whose teeth are spears and arrows, and their tongue a sharp sword.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaltare super cælos, Deus,  et in omnem terram gloria tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ר֣וּמָה עַל־הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם אֱלֹהִ֑ים עַ֖ל כׇּל־הָאָ֣רֶץ כְּבוֹדֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; let thy glory be above all the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laqueum paraverunt pedibus meis,  et incurvaverunt animam meam.  Foderunt ante faciem meam foveam,  et inciderunt in eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֶ֤שֶׁת ׀ הֵכִ֣ינוּ לִפְעָמַי֮ כָּפַ֢ף נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י כָּר֣וּ לְפָנַ֣י שִׁיחָ֑ה נָפְל֖וּ בְתוֹכָ֣הּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: They have prepared a net for my steps; my soul is bowed down: they have digged a pit before me, into the midst whereof they are fallen themselves. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Paratum cor meum, Deus, paratum cor meum ;  cantabo, et psalmum dicam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָ֘כ֤וֹן לִבִּ֣י אֱ֭לֹהִים נָכ֣וֹן לִבִּ֑י אָ֝שִׁ֗ירָה וַאֲזַמֵּֽרָה׃
verses.king_james: My heart is fixed, O God, my heart is fixed: I will sing and give praise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsurge, gloria mea ;  exsurge, psalterium et cithara :  exsurgam diluculo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ע֤וּרָה כְבוֹדִ֗י ע֭וּרָֽה הַנֵּ֥בֶל וְכִנּ֗וֹר אָעִ֥ירָה שָּֽׁחַר׃
verses.king_james: Awake up, my glory; awake, psaltery and harp: I myself will awake early.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitebor tibi in populis, Domine,  et psalmum dicam tibi in gentibus :
verses.king_james: I will praise thee, O Lord, among the people: I will sing unto thee among the nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam magnificata est usque ad cælos misericordia tua,  et usque ad nubes veritas tua.
verses.king_james: For thy mercy is great unto the heavens, and thy truth unto the clouds.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaltare super cælos, Deus,  et super omnem terram gloria tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ר֣וּמָה עַל־שָׁמַ֣יִם אֱלֹהִ֑ים עַ֖ל כׇּל־הָאָ֣רֶץ כְּבוֹדֶֽךָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens: let thy glory be above all the earth.
